understanding.inferredBusinessObjective: Close the mechanical gap between stored AG OS skills and actual project plans while making owner commands target registered projects.
successCriteria: Relevant active skills appear in the plan basis without granting permission.
Owner commands can target a registered project.
Metrics report plan-level skill reuse and cross-project planning evidence.
assumptions: All work remains local and source controlled until separately approved for publication.
No live connector, credential, deployment, production data, or paid action is needed.
ownerConstraints: The Constitution governs the entire system.
Roadmap work improves AG OS but does not grant permission.
Complete locally safe unfinished work and preserve approval gates.

rawCommand: Improve the AG OS dashboard planning system with skill reuse, project targeting, and scaled-operation metrics
plannedOutput: Plan-only command intake record for dashboard.
